content_body: What a spectacular cabin! The location was perfect—the photos of the view don't do it justice! The cabin itself was a perfect mix of cozy, country and modern, and the beds were the most comfortable beds ever! I slept for 14 hours straight my first night there. The staff at Cabin Rentals of Georgia was extremely helpful before, during and after our stay. My family rented the cabin for a few days (parents, siblings, and niece) and we had plenty of room for everyone, and privacy for all when needed. The town was lovely and charming, and we went for a gorgeous hike not too far away. I highly recommend this cabin.
title: Spectacular Cabin
